scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run build --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run build --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run build --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ui/mcp
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ui/mcp
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ui/mcp
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run format --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run format --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run format --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks && npm run format --workspace=@geti-ui/mcp
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace=@geti-ui/ui && npm run format:check --workspace=@geti-ui/smart-tools && npm run format:check --workspace=@geti-ui/charts && npm run format:check --workspace=@geti-ui/blocks && npm run format:check --workspace=@geti-ui/mcp
scripts.docs:dev:with-ui: concurrently -n ui,docs -c auto "npm run dev --workspace=@geti-ui/ui" "npm run dev --workspace=@geti-ui/documentation"
